รวมข้อ 3 งานระบบสุขาภิบาล

warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), the lower-numbered sheet (13/22), paired with sheet 14/22 extracted as _2.json.
This is a category-index sheet for category 3 (หมวดงานระบบสุขาภิบาล), directly confirming the cover sheet's (1/22) category-3 label 'หมวดงานระบบสุขาภิบาล' independently against this detail sheet.

Unlike category 2's index sheet (4/22), this index sheet DOES carry distinct item_no values (3.1, 3.2, 3.3) in their own column alongside a printed quantity of 1 and unit 'รวม' - a genuinely different table convention between the two index sheets, transcribed exactly as printed on each rather than normalized to match.
All quantities re-verified at higher clarity (1, 1, 1).
